## MJ App Root

- [ ] I worked from `mj-insight-vault-mvp/mj-insight-vault`
- [ ] I did not assume the repository root contains `package.json`

## Safety

- [ ] No production Supabase data mutation code added
- [ ] No DB schema or saved data shape change unless explicitly intended
- [ ] No default CI check calls Google Vision, OpenAI, or Supabase production APIs
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, or service account files added

## Verification

Run from `mj-insight-vault-mvp/mj-insight-vault`:

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:local`
